Class GameAction

java.lang.Object
boardifier.model.action.GameAction
Direct Known Subclasses:
DrawDiceAction, MoveWithinContainerAction, PutInContainerAction, RemoveFromContainerAction, RemoveFromStageAction
public abstract class GameAction extends Object

    • createAnimation

      protected abstract void createAnimation()
      create the animation associated to this action. This method must be overridden in subclasses and called at the end of their constructors

    • setupAnimation

      public Animation setupAnimation()
      initialize the animation. Used in the ActionPlayer thread to prepare the animation before it is started

    • onAnimationEnd

      public void onAnimationEnd(AnimationCallback callback)

    • onActionEnd
